Pratik’s journal
About

About

Hi, I am Pratik. I am an engineer and a self-taught graphic designer living in Bangalore.

I pay my bills working as a software developer at TCS BaNCS.

I read books, draw doodles, write nonsense, and cycle very little.

I also occasionally take pictures on my phone and post them on Flickr (why not Instagram, you ask? Well, I’m not a fan of their compression algorithm).

This journal is a collection of my tl;dr thoughts on all the unimportant things I come across.

Feel free to not follow me on Twitter.

I love watching movies and Gordon Ramsay’s Kitchen Nightmares.

I congratulate people on LinkedIn and remember birthdays on Facebook.

Unsolicited advice is welcome via email or messenger pigeon.

If you want to send something secret, here’s my public PGP key.

  • Pratik Nilange
  • pratik@nilange.com

My tl;dr thoughts on everything unimportant.
